title: Hilfe, ich bin unsichtbar
writer: Curth Flatow, Erwin Kreker, Rolf Meyer
actors: Theo Lingen, Inge Landgut, Fita Benkhoff
plot: At the funfair inventor wannabe Fritz is fascinated by a contraption that makes objects disappear. Inadvertently he himself becomes invisible with no chance to revert his predicament - only a huge dose of booze seems to help - tem...
